news.headline: CLPS Incorporation reports financial results for the second half and full year of fiscal 2024.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on October 18, 2024, CLPS Incorporation (Nasdaq: CLPS) revealed its financial performance for the six months concluding on June 30, 2024, as well as the full fiscal year 2024. The company faced distinct difficulties during fiscal 2024 because of the worldwide economic situation.

news.headline: GoDocs renews 2-year contract with Lima One Capital, a top lender for real estate investors in the US.
news.summary: In Los Alamitos, California on October 18, 2024, GoDocs, the top provider of automated commercial loan document creation services, revealed a significant development. They have officially extended their contract with Lima One Capital, a renowned lender for real estate investors in the United States, for another two years. This partnership is crucial as GoDocs caters to private lenders and plays a key role in the real estate finance sector.

news.headline: Hong Kong data center colocation market valued at USD 1.17 Billion in 2023, expected to reach USD 1.8 Billion by 2029 with a CAGR of 7.37%. 40% of IT load capacity by SUNeVision Holdings, Equinix, NTT DATA and Global Switch. 53 operational colocation centers, mainly Tier III standard.
news.summary: In Dublin, it was reported that the Hong Kong Data Center Colocation Market has shown significant growth potential. The market, valued at USD 1.17 billion in 2023, is projected to reach USD 1.8 billion by 2029, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.37%. Currently, the region boasts approximately 53 operational colocation data centers, many of which adhere to Tier III standards. This data indicates a strong demand for colocation services in Hong Kong, with a promising outlook for further expansion and development in the sector.

news.headline: Natuzzi S.p.A. will release Q2 2024 financial info on 10/22/24. Conference call on 10/23/24 at 11am EST (5pm Italy time).
news.summary: In Italy, Natuzzi S.p.A. (NYSE: NTZ) will be revealing its unaudited financial data for the second quarter of 2024 on October 22, 2024, after markets close. A conference call is scheduled for October 23, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. U.S. Eastern time (5:00 p.m. Italy time, or 4:00 p.m. UK time) for a discussion on the financial information. Interested individuals can participate by dialing in.

news.headline: Casa V opens first storefront in historic Vecki House, revitalizing Danville landmark.
news.summary: A new Casa V storefront in Danville, California is now open to the public, located in the Vecki House which is a historic landmark within the town. This marks the first physical store for Casa V in the area, symbolizing a blend of preservation and community-led development. The grand opening took place on October 18, 2024, showcasing the revitalization of this iconic location.

news.headline: Coop Pank held investor webinar on Q3 2024 results with Chairman Margus Rink & CFO Paavo Truu on Oct 18 at 9 am (EET) in Estonian.
news.summary: In the morning of October 18, 2024, at 9:00 AM (EET), Coop Pank conducted an investor webinar unveiling the unaudited financial outcomes of the Third Quarter of 2024. The webinar, conducted in Estonian, was presented by Chairman of the Board Margus Rink and Chief Financial Officer Paavo Truu.

news.headline: Edible Garden debuts sustainably focused, kosher, Non-GMO Pickle Party line at 2024 Global Produce & Floral Show.
news.summary: A new product line called Pickle Party is being launched by a company, featuring sustainably focused, kosher, Non-GMO condiments. This move is a significant step in the fresh condiments sector, as the company aims to offer cleaner and better-for-you ingredients in their products. This line is expected to set a precedent in the industry, with a focus on sustainability and health, appealing to consumers looking for environmentally conscious and healthier options in their food choices.

news.headline: Scatec ASA gets financial closure for a 103 MW/412 MWh battery energy storage project in South Africa.
news.summary: In Oslo on October 18, 2024, Scatec ASA, a prominent renewable energy company, has successfully secured financing for the Mogobe battery energy storage system with an impressive capacity of 103 MW / 412 MWh. The company is currently in the final stages of preparation to commence construction on this project.

news.headline: HONGQI's EH7 model has achieved EU-WVTA certification during the Paris Motor Show 2024, marking its entry into the European market.
news.summary: In Changchun, China on October 18, 2024, the HONGQI EH7, a new energy model created by FAW HONGQI, was granted the European Union Whole Vehicle Type Approval (EU-WVTA) certificate from Luxembourg's Ministry of Transport (SNCH) at the Paris Motor Show 2024.

news.headline: NHTSA investigating Tesla's Full Self-Driving amid Elon Musk's 2025 autonomy prediction. Q3 earnings upcoming.
news.summary: In October, Tesla experienced a decline in its performance as it gears up for the release of its Q3 earnings next week. The electric vehicle leader is currently encountering increased regulatory examination regarding its Full Self-Driving technology. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) has initiated an investigation into Tesla's Full Self-Driving system shortly after CEO Elon Musk mentioned the possibility of achieving autonomy by 2025. This development comes amidst growing concerns over Tesla's autonomous driving capabilities and their compliance with regulations.

news.headline: Zuckerberg invests in AI smart glasses, aiming to outpace Apple and Google with Meta platform despite metaverse losses.
news.summary: Investors in Meta are showing concern over significant losses in the metaverse sector, with the company experiencing setbacks. Despite this, Mark Zuckerberg remains optimistic about Meta's potential to revolutionize technology as the new leading platform. Zuckerberg is making a substantial investment in AI smart glasses, aiming to compete with tech giants like Apple and Google. The question arises whether Meta can outperform its competitors in this rapidly evolving market. The news has sparked discussions among stock investors and industry analysts about Meta's future prospects and their ability to dominate the AI smart glasses sector, amidst recent challenges.

news.headline: Avidity Biosciences up 441%, nearing record high in muscular dystrophy competition, 2 remain.
news.summary: Two companies are now competing in the race to treat a severe form of muscular dystrophy, as Avidity Biosciences emerges as a strong contender. Avidity Biosciences has seen an impressive increase of 441%, nearing another record high amidst the growing competition in the dystrophy treatment sector. The market is heating up with Avidity Biosciences making significant progress, leaving only two competitors in the race.

news.headline: Block reports impressive profit growth, receives rating upgrade due to improving technical performance, sparking speculation on its future trajectory.
news.summary: Block's technical performance is on the rise as it receives a Relative Strength Rating upgrade. The company has reported impressive profit growth, leading to increased investor interest. The question remains whether this positive trend will continue in the future.

news.headline: Amazon stock shows potential for growth as third quarter results approach, with a buy point at July highs.
news.summary: An extended consolidation pattern has been observed in Amazon's stock, with a key buying opportunity noted at the peak levels seen in July. The question arises: Is Amazon stock worth considering for purchase as the third-quarter results are approaching? This analysis was featured in Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Urban Poling Inc. collaborates with LSVT Global to enhance mobility for Parkinson's patients globally.CHARACTER COUNT: 110
news.summary: In Toronto on October 18, 2024, it was announced that a partnership with LSVT Global, known for their groundbreaking LSVT BIG® therapy program, has been established. The goal of this collaboration is to enhance mobility and quality of life for individuals with Parkinson's disease worldwide. This initiative aims to positively impact the global Parkinson's community through innovative approaches.

news.headline: New project, Get Up & GO Nova Scotia!, brings together family doctors, physiotherapists, and industry partners to promote health.
news.summary: Today in Halifax, Nova Scotia, Urban Poling Inc revealed the introduction of their innovative program, Get Up & GO Nova Scotia! The initiative focuses on enhancing cooperation between family doctors, physiotherapists, and industry partners such as retailers. This program is set to revolutionize the way these key players work together to promote overall health and wellness in the community. The goal is to increase accessibility to health resources and opportunities for physical activity.

news.headline: MidCap Financial Investment Corporation amends and extends its senior secured revolving credit facility totaling $1.815 billion.
news.summary: MidCap Financial Investment Corporation (NASDAQ: MFIC) has recently amended and extended its senior secured, multi-currency, revolving credit facility. The lender commitments for the Facility have now reached a total of $1.815 billion, with an increase of $110 million, excluding non-extending lender commitments. The Facility includes $155 million commitments from non-extending lenders set to expire on December 22, 2024. The extended final maturity date for extending lenders is now October 17, 2029, compared to the previous date of April 19, 2028. Other key terms of the Facility will remain largely unchanged moving forward.

news.headline: Cloudflare expands EMEA operations with new Lisbon HQ, supporting 350+ employees. Continued growth expected. Executives attend ribbon-cutting ceremony.
news.summary: Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE:NET) recently inaugurated a new headquarters and technical center in Lisbon, Portugal, to bolster its expanding EMEA operations and global presence. The Portugal team has substantially increased from 14 to over 350 employees since 2019, indicating significant growth. Future plans include further expansion in the region in the upcoming years. The launch event was marked by a ribbon-cutting ceremony, followed by a reception graced by Portugal’s Minister of Economy, Pedro Reis, and other dignitaries. Noteworthy Cloudflare executives, such as co-founder and CEO Matthew Prince and CTO John Graham-Cumming, were also in attendance, highlighting the company's commitment to its Portuguese operations and the EMEA market.

news.headline: Tree of Life Dispensaries mark 3rd anniversary and $1 million+ donated during "Making a Difference Month" in October.
news.summary: The Tree of Life dispensaries, based in Las Vegas, have generously contributed over $1 million during their "Making a Difference Month" in October. The company is marking its 3-year anniversary on Oct. 18 at all their locations. The founders, operators, and esteemed members of the Las Vegas community will come together to commemorate this milestone.

news.headline: HealthSignals partners with Aura Wireless for Apogee antenna technology, revolutionizing outdoor Wi-Fi, starting Oct 18, 2024.
news.summary: In King of Prussia, Pennsylvania, on October 18, 2024, HealthSignals announced its partnership with Aura Wireless as an authorized reseller and integration partner for the Apogee technology. The Apogee, a revolutionary antenna system, is the first of its kind to efficiently surpass stringent FCC power limitations. This collaboration signifies a major milestone in the industry, showcasing the significance of this cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Taicend Technology will showcase medical solutions at MEDICA 2024 in Düsseldorf, focusing on wound care innovations.
news.summary: In Kaohsiung, Taiwan, on October 18, 2024, Taicend Technology, a prominent brand specializing in advanced wound care and medical solutions, announced its dedication to innovating patient wound treatment for enhanced effectiveness and faster healing. The company is poised to reveal a detailed plan aimed at achieving this goal, showcasing its expertise in this field.

news.headline: 22 senior-level overseas Chinese media reporters visited Nanchang, Jiangxi from 5 continents on Oct 13-14, 2024.
news.summary: In Nanchang, China, on October 18, 2024, a report released by the Jiangxi International Communication Center (JXICC) highlighted a visit that took place from October 13 to 14. During this time, 22 senior-level reporters and editors from overseas Chinese media organizations across five continents traveled to Jiangxi to partake in an immersive experience.

news.headline: HONGQI reveals "TianGong" electric platform at Paris Motor Show 2024, showcasing EH7 sedan and EHS7 SUV.
news.summary: The electric platform named "TianGong" by HONGQI was introduced at the Paris Motor Show 2024 in Changchun, China. Featured at the event were the EH7 sedan and EHS7 SUV, constructed on this modular platform. The debut attracted significant attention with the EH7 and EHS7 vehicles showcasing innovative designs inspired by traditional elements.

news.headline: Pusan National University researchers create colorimetric sensor with wide color range, improved responsiveness, for real-time monitoring.
news.summary: A cutting-edge nanostructured Fano resonant colorimetric sensor has been introduced, offering improved sensitivity and a broader color spectrum than the usual RGB. This groundbreaking sensor was unveiled in BUSAN, South Korea on October 18, 2024. Colorimetric sensors are adept at identifying alterations in the environment by smoothly transitioning between colors, making them highly effective tools.

news.headline: 32% of life science marketing teams don't use KPIs for investment decisions. Nancy Phelan explains reasons behind this trend.
news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Trinity Life Sciences, a prominent player in strategy, insights, and analytics for the life sciences sector, has discovered that 32% of marketing and analytics teams in the field are either unaware of or not utilizing key performance indicators (KPIs) to drive changes in investment strategies. Nancy Phelan, the Senior Vice President of Customer Engagement at Trinity Life Sciences, highlighted the concerning trend, pointing out that numerous life science executives may have reasons for neglecting to incorporate KPIs into their decision-making processes.

news.headline: Mentholatum introduces Heel Revival Cream with patented technology for cracked heels, celebrating 135 years of innovation.
news.summary: Orchard Park, New York - Celebrating its 135th anniversary, Mentholatum introduces the Mentholatum® Heel Revival Cream to address stubborn cracked heels. The product can be found on Amazon with plans to be available on Walmart.com soon.

news.headline: AMPAC endorses Dr. Jill Stein for the 2024 presidential election, following unique challenges.
news.summary: In Dearborn, Michigan on October 18, 2024, the American Arab and Muslim Political Action Committee (AMPAC) has officially declared its support for Dr. Jill Stein as their chosen candidate for the upcoming 2024 presidential election. This endorsement comes at a critical time during this election cycle, with AMPAC highlighting the current challenges America faces which led to their decision to back Dr. Stein.

news.headline: LithiumHub announces $100k IONIC Lithium Battery Champions Invitational Bass Tournament in Norris, S.C.
news.summary: An event announcement has been made by LithiumHub in NORRIS, S.C., on October 18, 2024. They will be hosting the inaugural IONIC Lithium Battery Champions Invitational Bass Tournament. The unique 2-day tournament will feature unprecedented payouts, amounting to a total of $100,000.

news.headline: Best Day Brewing secured $22.5M in funding to expand its non-alcoholic beer range and national distribution network.
news.summary: Best Day Brewing, based in Sausalito, California, announced on October 18, 2024, that they secured an investment to enhance their product pipeline for non-alcoholic beer. As the fastest-growing brand in the US in this sector, they plan to expand distribution nationwide to keep up with the rising demand.

news.headline: Potential consequences in a strained Microsoft-OpenAI partnership, disruptive effects may alter AI competition.
news.summary: The partnership between the leading tech company and the firm associated with OpenAI has had a significant impact. Any potential disturbance in this collaboration could potentially alter the landscape of the artificial intelligence competition.

news.headline: Global avocado oil market to exceed $892.3 million by 2031, with CAGR of 5.82% from 2024-2031, fueled by demand for organic products and health awareness.
news.summary: The global avocado oil market is projected to reach a value of USD 892.3 million by 2031, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.82% from 2024 to 2031. The market has seen significant growth due to the increasing demand for organic and natural products, as well as the rising awareness of health benefits associated with avocado oil. Factors driving this market growth include the trend towards sustainable sources and advancements in the food and beverage industry. In 2023, the market revenue was reported at $578.34 million. The growing consumer awareness of health choices is leading to an increase in demand for avocado oil, fostering competition and innovation among manufacturers.

news.headline: WISE Las Vegas to hold 2nd "Las Vegas Women of Inspiration" event at Las Vegas Aces HQ on Nov 1, 2024, from 6-10 p.m.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, on October 18, 2024, WISE Las Vegas declared the upcoming 2nd annual "Las Vegas Women of Inspiration" event to be held at the renowned Las Vegas Aces Headquarters on Friday, November 1st, running from 6 to 10 p.m. The Las Vegas Aces stand out for being the first in the city's history, as well as on a national level.

news.headline: Global Sources Hong Kong Shows Phase II: Four major trade shows from Oct 18-21, featuring Mobile Electronics, Smart Home, and more.
news.summary: From October 18 to 21, 2024, the second phase of the Global Sources Hong Kong Shows will occur, featuring four significant trade shows: Mobile Electronics, Smart Home, Security & Home Appliances, Lifestyle, and Home & Kitchen shows. Taking place in Hong Kong, this event aims to showcase the latest trends and technologies in various industries.

news.headline: New book by AAPL explores private equity in healthcare, raising concerns on patient care & costs in US system.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, concerns were raised about the increasing impact of private equity (PE) on the healthcare system in the United States. A recent publication by the American Association for Physician Leadership (AAPL) addresses this issue. The book explores the implications of this trend on patient care, cost, and quality, highlighting potential challenges. The rising influence of PE in the healthcare sector has drawn attention due to its potential consequences.

news.headline: Troilus concludes $28M bought deal offering.
news.summary: In the latest data released, it is reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.8%, which is a significant improvement from the previous month. The economy has added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, exceeding expectations and providing a boost to the job market. Additionally, the GDP growth for the quarter stands at 6.2%, indicating a strong economic recovery. These numbers reflect a positive trend and are welcomed by both experts and policymakers as signs of a robust and growing economy.

news.headline: Global loyalty market to grow by 11.1% annually, reaching US$150.9 billion by 2024 with coalition loyalty programs gaining popularity.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report titled "Global Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report highlights that the global loyalty programs market is projected to experience a yearly growth rate of 11.1%, with an estimated value of US$150.9 billion by the year 2024. Over the past years, the market has shown a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.4%, showcasing significant advancement in loyalty programs across various sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics.

news.headline: American Express Q3 earnings: $16.64B revenue, $3.49 EPS beat estimates, card spending grows by 6%, revised annual outlook.
news.summary: In the third quarter, American Express Co's (NYSE:AXP) revenue, excluding interest expense, increased by 8% compared to the previous year, reaching $16.64 billion. This figure slightly fell short of the expected $16.67 billion according to analyst estimates. The growth was primarily driven by higher net interest income, elevated Card Member spending, and a consistent rise in card fees. Despite a rise in Amex’s stock price following the release of the report, the gains were later reversed during the premarket session on Friday. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $3.49 surpassed the anticipated $3.28 according to analyst predictions. Card Member spending, also known as Billed Business, saw a 6% increase year-over-year (or 6% forex adjusted). For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Adjuvanted and high-dose flu vaccines show similar effectiveness in adults 65+. First study to compare, data presented at IDWeek 2024.
news.summary: The initial findings from a randomized study on influenza vaccines revealed that adjuvanted and high-dose variants demonstrated similar effectiveness in combating PCR-confirmed influenza. This study represents the first of its kind to directly compare the relative effectiveness of adjuvanted influenza vaccines.

news.headline: Truist launches EBPP platform aiming to boost cash flow and client satisfaction with speed, simplicity, and security.
news.summary: A fresh Electronic Bill Presentment and Payment (EBPP) platform has been launched, promising to provide wholesale payments clients with a contemporary and adaptable payment experience. The new platform offers a blend of rapid processing, user-friendly interface, and robust security measures. Truist Financial Corporation unveiled this innovation in Charlotte, N.C., on October 18, 2024. This solution, introduced by the NYSE-listed company under the ticker symbol TFC, aims to enhance efficiency and convenience for users in their payment transactions.

news.headline: BCB Bancorp, Inc. reports Q3 2024 earnings of $6.7 million, $0.36 EPS, and declares $0.16 quarterly dividend per share.
news.summary: In Bayonne, New Jersey, on October 18, 2024, BCB Bancorp, Inc. disclosed a notable financial update. The company, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol BCBP and serving as the parent entity for BCB Community Bank, announced a third-quarter net income of $6.7 million for 2024. This figure marks a substantial increase from the $2.8 million reported in the second quarter of the same year, yet remains unchanged from the third quarter of 2023. Earnings per diluted share for Q3 2024 stood at $0.36, showing significant growth from both the previous quarter's $0.14 and the third quarter of 2023, which recorded $0.39 per share.

news.headline: Barbara Pilarski of Stellantis honored by United Way for philanthropy with Spirit of Tocqueville Award. Raised over $800,000.
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on October 18, 2024, Barbara Pilarski was honored with the esteemed Spirit of Tocqueville Award by United Way for Southeastern Michigan. She was acknowledged for her enduring dedication to philanthropy and community service. Pilarski played a key role in helping raise more than $800,000 for various charitable causes.

news.headline: A.I.S. Resources to raise $301,000 via private placement for gold projects in Australia with up to 8,600,000 Units at $0.035 each.
news.summary: A.I.S. Resources Limited based in Vancouver, British Columbia, revealed a non-brokered private placement plan on Oct. 18, 2024. The company intends to offer up to 8,600,000 Units priced at $0.035 each, aiming to generate $301,000 in gross proceeds. This initiative, known as the "Private Placement," will primarily fund general working capital needs and support exploration activities for the Company's gold projects in Australia. As part of the placement, there is a possibility of paying finder's fees up to 8% in cash and 8% in finder's warrants.

news.headline: Quorum Health buys Odessa Regional Med Center & Scenic Mountain Med Center in West Texas, expanding its reach.
news.summary: A recent transaction in Brentwood, Tennessee marked a significant expansion in the West Texas region for Quorum Health, a prominent provider of quality-driven hospitals. On October 18, 2024, subsidiaries of Quorum Health finalized the acquisition of Odessa Regional Medical Center in Odessa, Texas. This strategic move not only enhances the company's presence in the area but also signals a promising future outlook. This acquisition underscores Quorum Health's commitment to growth and quality healthcare services.

news.headline: CleanCore Solutions, Inc. (ZONE) set to ring NYSE Opening Bell, celebrates progress after debuting with ticker symbol "ZONE" on April 26, 2024.
news.summary: CleanCore Solutions, Inc. (NYSE American: ZONE), based in Omaha, NE, has developed patented technology to replace conventional cleaning chemicals with a safer and more cost-effective solution. The company will mark its achievements and listing on the New York Stock Exchange by ringing the NYSE Opening Bell at 11 Wall Street, New York City. Trading under the ticker symbol "ZONE" since April 26, 2024, CleanCore Solutions is set to celebrate its progress at the NYSE Building.

news.headline: SeaStar Medical reports over 50% enrollment in Adult Acute Kidney Injury trial for interim analysis. #medicalresearch
news.summary: In recent data, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate for the month of October dropped to 4.6%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.1%. The economy added 531,000 jobs in October, surpassing analyst expectations and showing strong recovery trends. These numbers indicate a positive turn in the labor market, with many industries seeing growth in employment opportunities. Additionally, the average hourly earnings increased by 0.3% in October, showcasing a rise in wages for workers. Overall, the latest statistics suggest a promising outlook for the economy as it continues to recover from the impacts of the pandemic.

news.headline: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings changes time for Q3 2024 financial results to avoid industry conflicts.
news.summary: In Miami on October 18, 2024, Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: NCLH) disclosed adjustments in the schedule for the release of its third quarter 2024 results and the related webcast to avoid overlapping with other industry earnings announcements. The company, also known as NCL Corporation Ltd., made this announcement to ensure minimal conflicts.

news.headline: FibroBiologics and Charles River partner to manufacture therapeutic cells for clinical trial on diabetic foot ulcers in 2025.
news.summary: In Houston on October 18, 2024, FibroBiologics, Inc. (Nasdaq: FBLG) partnered with Charles River Laboratories to forge a master services agreement. This collaboration aims to create and produce FibroBiologics' therapeutic master cell bank, working cell bank, and CYWC628, a fibroblast-based spheroids product. These will be utilized in an upcoming diabetic foot ulcer (DFU) clinical trial expected to commence in 2025. Charles River, a renowned global entity in drug discovery, development, testing, and manufacturing solutions, has joined forces with FibroBiologics for this significant project.

news.headline: HeartCore expects Q3 2024 revenues to range between $17M-$19M and net income to range between $9M-$11M.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, revenues are projected to rise to a range of $17 million-$19 million, while net income is anticipated to increase to a range of $9 million-$11 million.

news.headline: Oragenics to present at Centurion One Capital Summit in Bahamas on Oct 22-23 with President Michael Redmond speaking.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Oragenics Inc. (NYSE American: OGEN) revealed its participation in the Centurion One Capital 2nd Annual Bahamas Summit set to take place on October 22-23, 2024, at the Rosewood Baha Mar Hotel in Nassau, Bahamas. Michael Redmond, the President of Oragenics, is scheduled to engage in a corporate presentation and Q&A session on October 22, 2024, at 1:20 pm ET during the event.

news.headline: Fancamp starts survey over New Brunswick Acadian Gold JV. Land package covers 419km2 gold mineralized zones.
news.summary: Oct. 18, 2024 - Fancamp Exploration Ltd. has begun a Heliborne HeliTEM² Survey over the Riley Brook and McIntyre Brook properties in northern New Brunswick as part of the Acadian Gold Joint Venture with Lode Gold Resources Inc. The properties cover a total of 419 km2 of mineral claims with gold mineralized zones spanning kilometers, in alignment with Puma Exploration’s Williams Brook property. This initiative follows a recent strategic transaction with Lode Gold Resources, announced on Oct. 9, 2024, for the joint advancement of substantial mineral assets holding potential for a major discovery.
